node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"արու<lb xml:id=\"l104228422\" facs=\"#z104228422\" n=\"9\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>եստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z104228421","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104228421","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-002b"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"V1294":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z104421294","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104421294","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9086"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M691":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z104011247","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104011247","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"691-134a"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M7032":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z103990737","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103990737","n":"21"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-027b"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M8076":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z104095941","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104095941","n":"17"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8076.0351"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M695":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z103911784","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103911784","n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-279b"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M6712":{"lit":"արուես<lb xml:id=\"l104383764\" facs=\"#z104383764\" n=\"14\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>տաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z104383763","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104383763","n":"13"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-120a"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M9307":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","context":"text/body/ab[4]","n":"արուեստաւոր"},"M7227":{"lit":"արուեստ<lb xml:id=\"l103956997\" facs=\"#z103956997\" n=\"16\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>աւոր","line":{"facs":"#z103956996","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103956996","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-003b"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"},"V1108":{"lit":"արուեստաւոր","line":{"facs":"#z104421294","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104421294","n":"10"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9086"},"n":"արուեստաւոր"}}
